header.para: 潜在火灾危险注意事项

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:19px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

para.text: 请使用以下注意事项来保护机床设备，工厂以及周遭环境免受火灾的影响，保护操作员的安全。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 当使用切削液时，一定要使用水溶性切削液（A1类）。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

para.text: 使用水溶性切削液无火灾风险（除非所加工材料为特殊材料）。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-27px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 油基切削液有引起潜在火灾的危险。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

para.text: 如果不可避免的需要使用油基切削液，请务必遵守下述注意事项。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:63px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:63px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 切勿在无人值守模式下运行机床。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:74px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:74px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 在机床附近安装适当的消防设备。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:74px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:74px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 尽最大可能提供能够检测火灾的报警装置，自动灭火装置及其他设备。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:74px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:74px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 切勿营造能够引发潜在火灾的环境。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:74px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 在适当的切削条件下进行加工。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 执行适当的刀具管理措施，防止发生异常摩擦热和产生火花。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 切勿将碎屑堆积在加工室内。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 检查机床切削液供给是否恒定且足量。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:1px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ; font-family:Symbol; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-11px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:1px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:87px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:100px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 总是清理和有效组织机床周遭区域，切勿在此区域堆放可燃物质。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-26px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-26px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 加工易燃固体，树脂，木材和其他可燃材料时的注意事项。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

para.text: 当加工易燃固体或其他特殊材料时，在完全了解材料特性之后，确保完全执行安全措施。当加工树脂，木材和其他材料时时确保其安全性。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:1px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

para.text: 如加工材料时会产生灰尘和粉末，请确保提供能够防范某些类型材料粉尘爆炸危险的设备。

list.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-26px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ; font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:-26px; margin-top:8px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:62px left ;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

li.text: 提供吹扫加工时的注意事项。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:11px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text.style: font-family:SimSun; font-size:11pt; font-weight:normal; font-style:normal; text-decoration:none; text-transform:none; vertical-align:baseline; color:#000000; background-color:transparent; letter-spacing:normal; letter-scaling:100%;

para.text: 由于吹扫的冷却性能较差，喷出或飞出的碎屑温度极高。因此，切勿在加工室或机床周围放置易燃物品。

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:62px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-before:always; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
